description: A customer reports receiving a suspicious text message claiming to be from the company, asking for personal details.

nodes.task_description: Ask the customer for the content and sender of the text message.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent receives the details of the suspicious message.

nodes.task_description: Compare the message content and sender number against a list of known phishing scams.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the message is a known phishing attempt.

nodes.task_description: Advise the customer to delete the message, not to click any links, and report the number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides clear and accurate security advice.
